title: First-Time Home Buyer - Anxious Type
clientGreeting: Hi, I've been thinking about buying my first home but I'm honestly pretty nervous about the whole process. I'm not sure where to even start.
openingContext: A potential client has reached out about purchasing their first home. They appear uncertain and need guidance.
clientResponses: Yeah, I've been renting for about 5 years now and prices have gone up so much. I'm worried I won't qualify.
Well, I have a decent job but I'm not sure about my credit score. I've had some issues in the past.
That would be really helpful. Maybe we could talk about this more in detail? When could we set up a time to meet?

clientProfile.name: Sarah Martinez
clientProfile.discDescription: Steady, supportive, wants to build long-term relationship
keyTraits: Slow to make decisions but loyal once committed
painPoints: Anxious about complexity of home buying process
motivations: Build equity instead of paying rent

evaluationCriteria.reassurance: Did ISA provide reassurance about credit and qualification concerns?
evaluationCriteria.processExplanation: Did ISA explain the home buying process clearly?
evaluationCriteria.activeListening: Did ISA acknowledge and validate the client's concerns?
evaluationCriteria.needsDiscovery: Did ISA uncover budget, timeline, and property preferences?
evaluationCriteria.relationshipBuilding: Did ISA build trust and rapport?
evaluationCriteria.appointmentClosing: Did ISA successfully schedule a follow-up meeting?
